ids.description: List of case IDs to apply the template to.

caseTemplate.description: The case template name or ID to apply.

updateTitlePrefix.description: Whether to update the case title prefix from the template. Default: false.

updateDescription.description: Whether to update the case description from the template. Default: false.

updateTags.description: Whether to update the case tags from the template. Default: false.

updateSeverity.description: Whether to update the case severity from the template. Default: false.

updateFlag.description: Whether to update the case flag from the template. Default: false.

updateTlp.description: Whether to update the case TLP from the template. Default: false.

updatePap.description: Whether to update the case PAP from the template. Default: false.

updateCustomFields.description: Whether to update the case custom fields from the template. Default: false.

importTasks.description: List of task titles from the template to import into the cases.

importPages.description: List of page titles from the template to import into the cases.
